one_time_description: Sale of settlement trust lands from CFB lands claim settlement, proceeds internally restricted for tangible capital asset replacement reserve
economic_notes: First Nation is a member of Sto:lo Nation. Has interests in forestry (Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Forestry LP), environmental monitoring (Seven Generations Environmental Services Ltd.), property management (Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Tribe Society, Centre Creek LP), and tribal governance partnerships (Ts'elxweyeqx Tribe LP). Line of credit of $150,000 available but undrawn.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021 not 2024. Eight GBEs accounted for under modified equity method including forestry, environmental, and property partnerships. CFB lands claim settlement proceeds of $491,663 recorded as one-time revenue (vs $2,840,414 prior year). No schedule of remuneration disclosed. Current liabilities not separately broken out on face of statements provided. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($573,296) plus CMHC ($28,765) = $602,061. OSR includes gaming revenue sharing, GBE income, rental, interest, trust revenue, other grants, and land settlement proceeds.
